rules.summary: Check the current Git branch before committing.
rules.evidence: 커밋 전 반드시 현재 브랜치를 확인하세요

rules.summary: Never commit directly to the master branch.
rules.trigger_intent: creating a Git commit while the current branch is master

rules.summary: If the current branch is master, stop and create a branch from upstream/master before continuing.
rules.trigger_intent: continuing with repository commands after the branch check reports master
pushing Git commits to a remote

rules.summary: Do not commit when /qa-pr reports FAIL.
rules.trigger_intent: creating a Git commit after /qa-pr reports FAIL

rules.summary: Use Node 22.13.1 or newer and Yarn 1.22.22 for project commands.
rules.trigger_intent: running Node or Yarn commands for the project

rules.summary: When a .claude resource is absent from the current directory, search upward through parent directories.
rules.trigger_intent: searching for a .claude resource that was not found under the current working directory
rules.evidence: 현재 작업 디렉토리에서 찾지 못하면 상위 디렉토리로 올라가며 탐색합니다
